Our Product Collections

Sportswear & Team Uniforms

Basketball, soccer, baseball, football, hockey uniforms. Compression wear, tracksuits, polo shirts, hoodies, and accessories.

MOQ: 20 pcs Sublimation Embroidery

Streetwear

Oversized hoodies, vintage acid wash tees, cargo pants, puffer vests, denim jackets, windbreakers, graphic tees, and utility vests.

MOQ: 50 pcs Acid Wash DTG Print
24 Products

Medical Scrubs & Healthcare

Antimicrobial scrub sets, lab coats, surgical gowns, isolation gowns, scrub caps, and dental uniforms. AAMI compliant.

MOQ: 50 pcs Antimicrobial AAMI
24 Products

Kids & Children's Clothing

Boys, girls, and baby wear. School uniforms, activewear, dresses, tees, onesies. OEKO-TEX certified fabrics.

MOQ: 50 pcs OEKO-TEX Organic Cotton
26 Products

Plus Size & Inclusive Fashion

Sizes 0-28, XS-6XL. Dresses, jeans, activewear, loungewear, swimwear, blazers. True curve grading.

T-shirts, hoodies, joggers, polos, chinos, blazers, casual shirts. Core basics to smart casual.

Sustainable & Eco Fashion

Organic cotton, bamboo, hemp, recycled polyester, Tencel. GOTS & OEKO-TEX certified.

Manufacturing Capabilities

Techniques & Services

Beyond product categories, we offer specialized manufacturing techniques and value-added services.

Sublimation Printing

Full-color, all-over printing on polyester fabrics. Perfect for sportswear, team uniforms, and activewear with unlimited color options.

Screen Printing

Cost-effective bulk printing for cotton and blends. Ideal for t-shirts, hoodies, and promotional apparel with 1-6 color designs.

DTG Digital Printing

Direct-to-garment full-color printing with no setup costs. Perfect for detailed artwork, photos, and small-run custom designs.

Embroidery

Professional logo embroidery, monogramming, and decorative stitching. Up to 15 thread colors. Dimensional and 3D options available.

Heat Transfer / DTF

Direct-to-film transfers for complex multi-color designs on any fabric. Durable, vibrant, and perfect for streetwear and fashion.

Cut & Sew Manufacturing

Full pattern-to-garment production. Custom patterns, grading, marker making, and precision cutting for any garment type.

Private Label & Branding

Custom woven labels, printed tags, hang tags, poly bags, and branded packaging. Full brand identity integration from day one.

Antimicrobial Treatment

Silver-ion and zinc-based antimicrobial finishing for medical scrubs and healthcare garments. Effective for 50+ industrial washes.

Can't Find What You're Looking For?

We can manufacture virtually any garment type. Send us your design, tech pack, or reference and we'll make it happen.
